behavior_summary: This script is the 'U8P_AMOSTAT::look' (examine) handler for a statue/NPC. When the player looks at the object it shows a single short bark line and then pauses/waits.
Which bark is shown depends on the global flag ancientOnesMet: if that flag is true the script barks 'Amoras', otherwise it barks 'female statue '.
After emitting the bark the code calls suspend to wait for player acknowledgement or to advance the interaction.
notable_control_flow: U8P_AMOSTAT::look branches on the global flag ancientOnesMet (read) to select one of two short barks.
Both branches converge on a call to suspend, so regardless of branch the process pauses after displaying the message.
open_questions: What code elsewhere sets or clears ancientOnesMet and what precise game milestone does it represent? (inferred to track meeting the Ancient Ones)
Is the trailing space in the bark 'female statue ' intentional or a transcription artifact?
Are there any additional side-effects (logs, achievements, quest progress) triggered by showing this description outside this script? (none evident here)

main_function.name: U8P_AMOSTAT::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown when the player examines this statue/NPC; choose between two short barks based on a global flag, then pause.
entry_conditions: Triggered by a U8P_AMOSTAT::look/examine interaction (process U8P_AMOSTAT::look)
Runs when the engine invokes the object's U8P_AMOSTAT::look process (process type 0x0208)

function_map.name: U8P_AMOSTAT::look
function_map.role: U8P_AMOSTAT::look/examine handler that selects and displays a short bark based on a global flag

function_map.name: suspend
function_map.role: engine-provided pause/wait called after displaying bark

external_calls.purpose: Pause or wait after showing the bark so the player can acknowledge/advance

reads.name: ancientOnesMet
reads.likely_effect: Selects which short description/bark to display; inferred to record whether the party has met the Ancient Ones

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script is the 'U8P_AMOSTAT::look' (examine) handler for a statue/NPC. When the player looks at the object it shows a single short bark line and then pauses/waits.
